About Organization

UP State Council for Vocational Training is responsible for conducting ITI admissions in Uttar Pradesh.

For more information, visit the official website.


About the Programme

UP SCVTUP ITI Admissions 2026 is an opportunity for candidates to pursue vocational training in various fields.

The programme aims to provide candidates with the necessary skills and knowledge to excel in their chosen field.
